Welcome to SandwichBox


Optimize your crypto trades with our cutting-edge sandwich bot.

About Sandwich Bot

Sandwich Bot is a revolutionary tool designed to enhance your trading efficiency by monitoring pending transactions in the mempool and executing sandwich trades seamlessly.

Choose Your Plan

Newbie

Fee 0.5% per transaction.

Limited to 50 transactions per second.

HOT!

CryptoDad

Fee 0.02% per transaction.

Limited to 200 transactions per second.

SandwichBoxer

Fee 0.01% per transaction.

Unlimited transactions.

How It Works

  1. Connect your wallet securely.
  2. Monitor the mempool for transaction opportunities.
  3. Execute front-running and back-running trades with precision.
